calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2013 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Set For Trial On Sep-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Roberto Ripamonti, Esq. of Lohr Ripamonti LLP, Tel. 415.729.4718, for defendant and moving party;
Megan Elsea, Esq., Staff Counsel, Dept. of Fair Employment & Housing, Tel. 916.478.7251, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT TURNER-SHIBATA, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Denied. Plaintiff has alleged sufficient facts to support a prayer for punitive damages. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
